movies.original_title: เส้นตาย สายลวง
movies.overview: Three women fall prey to a ruthless phone scam. To settle the score, they'll take on the criminal network that stole their money — and their dignity.
movies.tagline: When the victim becomes the hunter. When the law fails it's time to reclaim.
movies.title: The Red Line

movies.original_title: ตี๋ใหญ่ ฤกษ์ดาวโจร
movies.overview: In 1980s Bangkok, a wily thief stages a series of daring heists, baffling the authorities and the public — until one cop sets out to take him down.
movies.tagline: Meet the "King of Thieves", whose life is coming to an end.
movies.title: Tee Yai: Born to Be Bad

movies.original_title: ปัง
movies.overview: Follows a ruthless hitman who, after narrowly escaping a fatal attempt on his life, betrays his gang in an effort to find forgiveness but ends up becoming a target himself.
movies.tagline: Once a killer, now the mark.
movies.title: Bang

movies.original_title: อนงค์ 2..สามสี่ชาติ
movies.overview: Witness the deep bond between Joe and Anong, which has been long-lasting through many lifetimes and reincarnations.
movies.title: My Boo 2

movies.original_title: องค์บาก
movies.overview: When the head of a statue sacred to a village is stolen, a young martial artist goes to the big city and finds himself taking on the underworld to retrieve it.
movies.tagline: No computer graphics. No stunt doubles. No wires.
movies.title: Ong-Bak

movies.original_title: ฟู้ดทรัค ลัก (รัก) หมูเด้ง
movies.overview: Jake and Bobby, with the art director by the truck, don't know their vehicle will force Mamiew to face his past once more.
movies.tagline: Love is on the menu but every recipe has its secrets.
movies.title: Food Truck: Stolen Love... and Moo Deng

movies.original_title: หมู่บ้านโคกะโหลก
movies.overview: A wave of chilling serial murders emerges, marked by the gruesome decay of male victims' secret part. As the police investigate, they confront eerie local myths and dark secrets.
movies.tagline: The legend awakens. terrifying. ridiculous. unstoppable.
movies.title: Ko Ga Loak Village

movies.original_title: ต้มยำกุ้ง
movies.overview: A young fighter named Kham must go to Australia to retrieve his stolen elephant. With the help of a Thai-born Australian detective, Kham must take on all comers, including a gang led by an evil woman and her two deadly bodyguards.
movies.title: The Protector

movies.original_title: หลานม่า
movies.overview: M, a university dropout low on money and luck, volunteers to take care of his terminally ill grandmother, in the hope of pocketing an inheritance.
movies.tagline: Never underestimate a grandma's love for her family.
movies.title: How to Make Millions Before Grandma Dies

movies.original_title: ผีใช้ได้ค่ะ
movies.overview: Worried about her husband being allergic to dust, Nat, a recently-dead woman, returns as a ghost possessing a vacuum cleaner to clean the house and protect her family from other vengeful ghosts in the house. To become a useful ghost, she needs to get rid of the useless ones.
movies.title: A Useful Ghost

movies.original_title: ร่างทรง
movies.overview: A shaman's family learn that their goddess is supposedly controlling one of them. However, their lives take a frightening turn when they realise the goddess has nothing to do with the possession.
movies.tagline: A story about shamanism in Thailand.
movies.title: The Medium

movies.original_title: ธี่หยด
movies.overview: When a remote village is plagued by a deadly curse, one brother must fight to save his family from a terrifying supernatural threat.
movies.tagline: The haunted, calling voices will follow you everywhere.
movies.title: Death Whisperer

movies.original_title: ปากกัด ตีนถีบ
movies.overview: In a fight for survival against a horrifying army of zombies, a former Muay Thai fighter must use skill, speed and grit to save his girlfriend.
movies.tagline: This barehanded fighter will knock down a horde of zombies.
movies.title: Ziam

movies.original_title: ข้างบ้าน
movies.overview: A successful sales executive and his pregnant wife find their dream home. But after moving in, strange occurrences begin to happen, while a mysterious connection between the husband and the house next door emerges.
movies.tagline: Are you ready to stay with the ghost next door?
movies.title: Our House

movies.original_title: จันดารา ปฐมบท
movies.overview: Jan, a young boy, grows up without a mother and is often insulted by his father. He struggles with his life as he longs to be with several women, even Madame Boonleung, his father's lover.
movies.tagline: A tragedy of lust, love and revenge…
movies.title: Jan Dara: The Beginning

movies.original_title: คายอ้อ ลบหลู่ ศรัทธา อาถรรพ์
movies.overview: Tragedy strikes when, during a sacred ritual, Chai suffers a horrifying death. Rumour spreads among his mor lam troupe that his death was caused by a violation of the sacred rite known as Khai Aor.

production_companies.name: คณะหมอลำสาวน้อยเพชรบ้านแพง
สาวน้อยเพชรบ้านแพง

movies.title: Kayaor Disrespecting Faith and the Supernatural

movies.original_title: มหาอุตม์
movies.overview: In the late 70's, "Sergeant Thong" and "Sergeant Khachon", two best friends who had tattooed the Maha Utma amulet together, went on a secret mission in the border with the enemy as mercenaries. Instead, they suffer major losses when their units are completely destroyed by the enemy. While waiting to die without military reserves Instead, they find that the invincible supreme power has helped turn the situation into an opportunity.
movies.title: Maha ut

movies.original_title: ชัตเตอร์ กดติดวิญญาณ
movies.overview: When Jane and Tun run over a girl in a car accident, they speed away immediately from the crime scene. However, Tun, a photographer, soon discovers strange shadows in his photos, which unsettles them.
movies.tagline: The most terrifying images are the ones that are real.
movies.title: Shutter

movies.original_title: จันดารา
movies.overview: Jan is a boy growing up in 1930s Siam in a wealthy, dysfunctional family where sex has a huge impact on everyone's lives. Jan is viewed by his father as cursed, since his mother died giving birth to him.
movies.title: Jan Dara

movies.original_title: เขาชุมทอง คะนองชุมโจร
movies.overview: At the tail end of World War II, a bandit leader and his crew go up against his sworn enemy and the Japanese army to rob a train full of gold.
movies.title: Gold Rush Gang

tv_shows.name: Club Friday
tv_shows.original_name: Club Friday
tv_shows.overview: Based on a Thai radio show that gives love advice to callers, this series dramatizes stories of infidelity, love triangles, sexual identity and more.

seasons.name: Club Friday 3 - Three Love Three Life
Club Friday 9
seasons.overview: This is a series of short stories based on a radio program called "Club Friday", where people call in to tell their stories. The stories told are a true account of their life. Each series has a different story and cast. Season nine's theme is "To Love Isn't to Die".

seasons.name: Club Friday 10
seasons.overview: This series of short stories is based on a radio show called "Good Friday Club", where people call in to tell their stories. This season is about unfaithful love.

seasons.name: Club Friday 11
seasons.overview: "Club Friday 11" is a series of true stories about messy love.

seasons.name: Club Friday 12: Uncharted Love
seasons.overview: "Club Friday 12" is a collection of short series about uncharted, hidden love.

seasons.name: Club Friday 13: Love Seasons Celebration
seasons.overview: Club Friday 13 is a collection of stories about love—the good and the bad—in times of celebration.

seasons.name: Club Friday 14: Love And Belief
seasons.overview: The most popular series based on the true story of love, the most dramatic that calls to tears, with the concept of morality. and law of karma along the way to reflect the real life of human beings It has been continuously popular for more than 10 years with 14 seasons, including more than 100 stories, guaranteed by quality with many prestigious awards. This year the 14th season has arrived: Club Friday The Series 14 Love and Belief. Bringing stories of love and belief from real life people in modern times who believe in various stories that will affect love, causing it to come crashing down. Because one chooses to believe in everything too much, but does not choose to believe in their own heart. Featuring leading quality actors in Thailand.

seasons.name: Club Friday 16: Hot Love Issue
seasons.overview: An anthology series depicting messy interpersonal situations taken from the "Club Friday" radio programme.

seasons.name: Club Friday 17: Theory of Love
seasons.overview:
No theory works for every love.

Love theories have been discussed and practiced over time. Some find them transformative, others ineffective due to relationship complexities. The series asks: Can any single theory truly apply to every kind of love in today’s evolving world?

seasons.name: Club Friday 18: Love Status
seasons.overview: An exploration of different kinds of relationship and dating red flags in this era.

tv_shows.name: Dhevaprom
tv_shows.original_name: ดวงใจเทวพรหม
tv_shows.overview: Dhevaprom is a Thai lakorn based on the novel of the same name and written by the same writers as its preceding story ... The Five Brothers series, that aired in 2013. Dhevaprom consists of Laorchan, Kwanruetai, Jaiphisut, Dujapsorn and Porncheewan.

seasons.name: Dhevaprom Laorchan
seasons.overview:
Laorchan, who grew up in France and was reared by the elite, returns to Thailand to prove her family’s innocence and learn the truth about her origins. Laorchan plans to steal an ancient, accursed gemstone—the Ajna Chakra necklace—exhibiting at an aristocratic department store owned by M.L. Phuthanet Juthathep, son of M.R. Ratchanon and Soifah.

She befriends the suave Phuthanet and he is instantly taken by her charm, beauty, and mysterious persona. Complications arise when she starts to fall for him, as deception and love are things that don’t go together. Can she resist his charms and accomplish her objective?

seasons.name: Dhevaprom Kwanruetai
seasons.overview: A doctor from a noble family and a girl with an unrevealed past - will they ever fall in love amidst a fight against drug trafficking? Kind, generous and hardworking Kwanruetai is the daughter of M.L Maratee Dhevaprom, whose whole being is in earnest for her mother’s love and approval. She meets young military doctor - Major Dr. M.L Chatklao Jutathep, while on duty in the northern province of Thailand, where they are caught in the throes of danger due to gangs and drug wars. Chatklao falls in love with Kwanruetai but she is conflicted given their families’ long-standing estrangement. Her mother is dead-set against Kwanruetai’s romance with Chatklao as his father - M.R. Phudhipat, had humiliated her when he broke off their betrothal, for another woman. Will Kwanruetai listen to her heart; or are the Jutatheps and Dhevaproms, just not meant to be together?

seasons.name: Dhevaprom Jaipisut
seasons.overview: Capt. Ronnajak Jutathep, eldest son of M.R. Ronnaphee, is entrusted with his deceased friend’s younger sister, Sunida. When he enrols Sunida at his alma mater, he runs into a former classmate, Jaipisut, who is now a teacher. Jaipisut barely tolerates Ronnajak, as she has no good childhood memories of him because of his teasing; but the two are forced to play nice together when Sunida has problems at school. Building a friendship with your arch-nemesis is never easy. Theirs is far more complicated when Jaipisut finds out she is adopted, and from the heirloom brooch left by her birth mother, she might be a Dhevaprom. Will Jaipisut’s connection to the Dhevaprom prove too much for Ronnajak to overcome, or will the two realise that what they have is worth fighting for?

seasons.name: Dhevaprom Dujupsorn
seasons.overview: "Fah" Dujupsorn’s mother M.L. Wilairampha remains resentful of M.R. Ronnaphi Juthathep for breaking a promise to marry her. Fah loves her mother so much that she is ready to take revenge on the Juthatheps; she is to apply for a job at a Juthathep-owned company and seduce M.L. Ronnaphum Juthathep to fall for her, only to hurt him. Ironically, it is Fah who falls in love; she is stunned when she meets the president of the company, Major M.L. Asira Juthathep, the eldest son of M.R. Tharathorn, as he is the charming and handsome soldier from her past who had once saved her life. She now faces the toughest decision of her life: revenge may not be her choice, but it is her destiny.

seasons.name: Dhevaprom Poncheewan
seasons.overview: Cheewan gets the order to be a matchmaker for Saruj—the secretary of the Thai ambassador in Rome, Italy—and Porncheewa, the perfect student who is studying there. Her mission isn't easy as Khun Saruj is cold and Cheewa is arrogant. Cheewan plots a sweet trip for them to Italy. However, Khun Saruj started falling for Cheewan instead of Phorncheewa.
